caption: If you’re looking for a boutique hotel in the Hamptons this is your sign to stay here! #travelbucketlist #thehamptons #easthampton #hamptonshotels #boutiquehotels

transcription.text: Where to stay in the Hamptons. If you're creating a dreamy boutique hotel with chic design for rooms, garden dinners under string lights, and by the fire, this is your sign to book the summer you'll actually remember at the Maidstone Hotel. Just click the green location tag to book.
